qualificationBoundary: This proves the v12.20 rendered web integrity path. Pure-state tests prove diagnostic assertions and an adapter injection proves memory-pressure events do not stop capture. It does not prove physical native recording/transcription, memory-pressure delivery during mobile suspension, or destination-app receipt.
